## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` is green, with tests for new behavior
- [ ] The offline mock mode still works with no keys and no network
- [ ] No new required runtime dependency (or explained above)
- [ ] UI strings, if any, are bilingual FR/EN via `corparius/i18n.py`
- [ ] Docs updated if user-visible behavior changed
